ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 obsidian-bullet

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep the caret in the editable text instead of the markdown prefix. Use Never to edit bullets and checkboxes directly, Bullets to stay out of `- ` or `1. `, or Bullets and checkboxes to also stay out of `[ ]` / `[x]` markup.
ast.target: 将光标保持在可编辑文本中，而不是 Markdown 前缀上。使用“从不”可直接编辑项目符号和复选框，使用“仅项目符号”可避开 `- ` 或 `1. `，使用“项目符号和复选框”还可避开 `[ ]` / `[x]` 标记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make Tab and Shift-Tab behave the same as other outliners.
ast.target: 使 Tab 和 Shift-Tab 的行为与其他大纲编辑器相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make the Enter key behave the same as other outliners.
ast.target: 使 Enter 键的行为与其他大纲编辑器相同。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a bullet when pressing o or O in Vim mode.
ast.target: 在 Vim 模式下按 o 或 O 时创建项目符号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press the hotkey once to select the current list item. Press the hotkey twice to select the entire list.
ast.target: 按一次快捷键选择当前列表项。按两次快捷键选择整个列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Styles are only compatible with built-in Obsidian themes and may not be compatible with other themes.
ast.target: 样式仅与内置 Obsidian 主题兼容，可能与其他主题不兼容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show guide lines that connect nested list items by indentation level.
ast.target: 显示连接嵌套列表项的垂直缩进引导线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click a vertical indentation line to fold or unfold that list.
ast.target: 单击垂直缩进线可折叠或展开该列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move list items on desktop by dragging a bullet, fold indicator, or checkbox.
ast.target: 在桌面端，通过拖动项目符号、折叠指示器或复选框来移动列表项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open DevTools (Command+Option+I or Control+Shift+I) to copy the debug logs.
ast.target: 打开开发者工具（Command+Option+I 或 Control+Shift+I）以复制调试日志。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Stick the cursor to the content
ast.target: 将光标固定在内容上

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 增强 Tab 键

ast.target: 增强 Enter 键

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enhance the Ctrl+A or Cmd+A behavior

ast.name: setName

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The item cannot be moved. Fix the invalid list indentation and try again.
ast.target: 无法移动该项。请修复无效的列表缩进后重试。
